chapter_title: Regul. of Outdoor Signs on Rural Roads
text: The commission or a person designated by the commission, in an appropriate case and subject to an appropriate condition or safeguard, may make a special exception to this chapter regarding a permit for an off-premise outdoor sign on a rural road.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 394. Regul. of Outdoor Signs on Rural Roads
##### § 394.050 — Variance

The commission or a person designated by the commission, in an appropriate case and subject to an appropriate condition or safeguard, may make a special exception to this chapter regarding a permit for an off-premise outdoor sign on a rural road.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 50, eff. September 1, 2011.*
